hooks.description: Blocks any git push or git commit directly to main or protected branches. Exit 2 cancels the tool call.
Blocks git add . and git add -A. Forces explicit file listing to prevent accidental staging of secrets or unrelated files.
Blocks reading .env files to prevent secret exposure. Claude should never access .env files containing credentials.
After any .py file is written, automatically runs ruff check --fix and ruff format. Keeps code quality consistent without manual steps.
After any .py file is edited, automatically runs ruff check --fix and ruff format.
On session end, saves current devflow state (active ticket, branch, worktree path) to .devflow-state.json so a crashed or interrupted session can be resumed.
